response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform leadership; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of distributed systems or cloud compute architecture leadership, and they have no documented experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning cloud platform strategy.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure setup
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks documented leadership in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems
No evidence of technical ownership of large-scale cloud infrastructure projects
